name: tkn-codex-context-engineering
description: Preserve, resume, register, migrate, load, audit, distill, and recover Codex working context, session notes, decisions, local session history, project registry metadata, and user-global context across chats and repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain and resume working context, project registry metadata, session notes, decisions, and global Codex context
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that groups context engineering skills and scripts for repository project registration, legacy local-context migration, working context, session notes, session resume, session distillation candidates and finalization, decision records, decision review, local Codex session-log extraction, read-only global context loading, freshness audit, and explicit snapshot import or promotion through ~/.codex-context.
defaultPrompt: Distill a session note into reusable context candidates
Finalize a session note's distillation metadata after review
Extract and summarize a topic from local Codex session logs
Audit context freshness before relying on previous decisions
Load selected global Codex context for this task
Register this repository in the global Codex context registry
Move legacy local Codex context into the global project context folder
Promote this session's reusable learning globally
